title: Reproducibility package for A Bianchi-Compatible Retained/Residual Interface for Finite Lattice Yang--Mills Theory

creators.name: Mkrttchian, Gratchia
creators.affiliation: Higher Colleges of Technology - CERT; The Centre of Excellence for Applied Research & Training

description: Finite-regulator reproducibility package containing scripts, certificates, and documentation for certified cuboidal Bianchi-template checks and related structural records. This package does not prove continuum Yang-Mills existence, Osterwalder-Schrader reconstruction, confinement, or a spectral mass gap.
